RULING:
DEFENDANT J AND H MARINE & INDUSTRIAL ENGINEERING COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant J and H Marine & Industrial Engineering Company's motion for summary judgment and alternate summary adjudication are denied. Defendant's separate statement fails to set forth sufficient facts entitling defendant to any of the relief it seeks. Specifically, the separate statement acknowledges that employees of defendant's predecessor worked in the presence of Mr. Faiapau, but nowhere in the separate statement is there any fact establishing the absence of asbestos in any of the materials that those employees worked with. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
